['""', '""', '"Hey everyone, just wanted to throw out there that I tried this new spicy recipe last night and it was off the charts! Maybe stick to making mixtapes instead of trying to educate us on social justice. And since when did age give you a pass on being disrespectful?"', '"@delicious-gator, let\'s keep the dialogue constructive and respectful. Attacking others doesn\'t advance the conversation. Can you share your thoughts on the topic in a way that builds on the discussion?"', '"Guys, let\'s not lose sight of the actual issues here. We all come from different backgrounds and have different experiences. Instead of getting into personal attacks, why don\'t we focus on sharing our views respectfully? After all, isn\'t that what this forum is for?"', '""', '"Wow, everyone\'s so serious here. Can we just admit that none of our opinions really matter in the grand scheme of things? Why bother understanding different perspectives when you can just ignore everyone who doesn\'t agree with you? Sounds like a waste of time to me."', '"Simple-chili, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Sharing different viewpoints can lead to meaningful insights. Can you share why you feel this way?"']
